display.purpose: Big headlines on landing pages only.

body.purpose: Main content font, forms, cells, and finance tables.

shadows.name: interactive-rise
shadows.purpose: Subtle interactive feedback shadow on card containers and primary buttons.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Snappy, professional easing for UI element transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #4f46e5; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #4338ca; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.08); }

components.name: Financial Card
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(79, 70, 229, 0.08); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #64748b; margin: 0 0 8px 0; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-card-value { font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A sleek, highly structured financial workspace built around precision, density, and localized trust. It rejects ambient shadows and warm-cream templates in favor of sharp boundaries, clean typography, and excellent contrast.
keyCharacteristics: Focused Indigo visual identity with dark slate/blue depth.
High typographic readability separating numbers (Inter) from branding/headings (Poppins).

rules.name: The Indigo Constraint Rule
rules.body: The primary clean indigo color (#4f46e5) is used selectively on <=10% of any given screen. Primary actions and brand markers carry the accent.

rules.name: The Boundary Rule
rules.body: Depth must always be created using solid borders (1px) in combination with layout changes. Ambient drop shadows are prohibited unless explicitly triggered by interactive states.

dos: Do format all currency amounts explicitly via Intl.NumberFormat('id-ID').
Do use a Calendar-based date picker for manual transactions instead of simple text inputs.
Do provide in-page skeleton loading animations for fields while OCR processing is active.
donts: Don't use warm neutral/beige 'SaaS-cream' default background colors.
Don't apply border-radius values greater than 16px to cards or sections.
Don't pair a 1px solid border with a drop shadow of 16px or greater blur.
